question: Which of the following best describes the rainfall pattern in City Q during 2023?

options.A: Rainfall was highest in January and lowest in July.
options.B: Rainfall was lowest in January and highest in July.
options.C: Rainfall remained nearly constant throughout the year.
options.D: Rainfall steadily declined from January through June without changing afterward.

explanation: The inverted Y-axis makes it appear that the series is flipped vertically, which can swap the perceived highs and lows. The correct option matches the actual data values.
